## Summary

Describe the requested feature briefly.

## Use case

What problem does this solve in a real workflow?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the interface or behavior you expect.

## Alternatives considered

List other possible approaches if relevant.

## Additional context

Add examples, mockups, or notes if useful.
